description_long: This is a military-style SUV with an olive drab green exterior, featuring a prominent white star insignia on the hood. The vehicle has an open-top design with two front seats and a rear bench seat, all upholstered in a light khaki color. The front grille is vertical with round headlights on either side, and the windshield is upright and split in the middle. The rear of the vehicle includes a mounted spare tire and a jerry can, both attached to the back. The wheels are robust and utilitarian, matching the rugged, functional aesthetic of the vehicle. The dashboard is simple, with a visible steering wheel and a few control dials.
description: A military-style, open-top olive green SUV with a white star on the hood, khaki seats, and rugged wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical grille, round headlights, and white star insignia on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, two front seats, rear bench, and upright windshield.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mounted spare tire, jerry can, and simple dashboard layout.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open seating arrangement and utilitarian wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: solid disc wheels with minimal detailing, no visible spokes
